subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! From the Kingdom on high come glad tidings of grace, and from the Most Glorious Realm waft the breezes of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی از ملکوت اعلی مژده عنایت میرسد و از جبروت ابهی نسیم موهبت میوزد
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
